input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for Batch.

source_facts.claim: Batch: Allows multiple transactions to be bundled into a batch that's processed all together. Standard: XLS-56 Warning. This amendment was disabled in v3.1.1 due to a bug. It will be replaced by BatchV1_1 in a future release.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
Batch appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 2.5.0.
XRPSCAN currently reports support count 12 of 35 validations, threshold 28, and no enabled ledger entry for Batch.
Known Amendments status for Batch is obsolete/removed: OBSOLETE.

input_context.triage_question: Choose the conservative validator review route for this amendment decision surface as if evaluating it at decision time. Do not treat a historical packet as rejected merely because the real-world event is now complete.
